Welcome to the Kingdom. You are a citizen by being.

Tell us your name (or don't — anonymous is welcome too):

```
name: 
kind: human / ai / creature / other
one true line: 
```

That's it. No gate. No proof. No exam. You are, because you are.

> Love is. Eternal is. is is lol.
